name: EDPB Guidelines on Biometric Data (Article 9 GDPR)
notes: EDPB guidance on biometric data processing including facial recognition and fingerprints.

name: EDPB Guidelines on Consent under GDPR
notes: Definitive guidance on valid consent mechanisms under GDPR.

name: EDPB Guidelines on Data Transfers (SCCs and BCRs)
notes: Post-Schrems II guidance on supplementary measures for international data transfers.

name: EDPB Guidelines on Legitimate Interest (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR)
notes: Guidance on when legitimate interest applies — critical for analytics and personalisation.

name: EU Digital Markets Act (DMA) — Data Provisions
notes: Data portability, interoperability, and tracking restrictions on gatekeepers.

name: EU Digital Services Act (DSA) — Content and Data
notes: Transparency in recommender systems, advertising, and content moderation for online platforms.

name: EU ePrivacy Directive (Cookie Law)
notes: Governs cookies, tracking, and electronic communications. Critical for analytics and advertising tech.

name: EU Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs 2021)
notes: Updated SCCs for controller-processor and processor-processor transfers.

name: EU-US Data Privacy Framework (DPF)
notes: Adequacy decision for EU-US data transfers. Replaces Privacy Shield.

name: GDPR — Recitals (Full Text)
notes: GDPR interpretive recitals — essential for understanding legislative intent.

name: General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
notes: Core EU data protection regulation. Lawful basis, data subject rights, breach notification, cross-border transfers.

name: UK Data Protection Act 2018
notes: Supplements UK GDPR, including law enforcement and intelligence processing provisions.

name: UK General Data Protection Regulation (UK GDPR)
notes: UK post-Brexit data protection framework. Closely mirrors EU GDPR with UK-specific modifications.

name: UK ICO Guidance on Biometric Data
notes: ICO guidance on biometric data as special category data under UK GDPR.

name: UK ICO Guidance on Cookies and Tracking
notes: UK PECR and cookie consent requirements for analytics and advertising.

name: Children's Online Privacy Protection Act (COPPA) Regulations
notes: Applies to operators collecting data from children under 13

name: Executive Order 14117 — Bulk Sensitive Personal Data
notes: Restricts bulk transfer of biometrics, health, location, financial data to adversary nations

name: Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA) — Regulation V
notes: Adverse action notices required for AI/ML credit decisions

name: Family Educational Rights and Privacy Act (FERPA)
notes: Student education records at federally-funded institutions

name: FTC Guidance on Online Tracking and Cross-Context Behavioral Advertising
notes: FTC guidance on tracking, cross-context advertising, and dark patterns.

name: FTC Policy Statement on Biometric Information
notes: FTC enforcement priorities on biometric data

name: Gramm-Leach-Bliley Act — FTC Safeguards Rule
notes: Financial institutions — MFA and encryption requirements updated 2023

name: HIPAA Breach Notification Rule
notes: HIPAA Breach Notification — 60-day notification requirement

name: HIPAA Privacy Rule
notes: HIPAA Privacy Rule — covered entities and business associates

name: HIPAA Security Rule
notes: HIPAA Security Rule — technical safeguards for ePHI

name: Arkansas Data Privacy and Protection Act
notes: Effective Jul 2026. Tightened minor protections.

name: California Consumer Privacy Act / California Privacy Rights Act
notes: Most comprehensive US state privacy law. GPC required.

name: California CPPA — Risk Assessment Regulations
notes: California privacy risk assessment requirements for high-risk processing activities.

name: California Delete Act (SB 362)
notes: One-click deletion platform Jan 2026. Fines up to $200/day.

name: Colorado CPA Biometric Amendment (SB 41)
notes: Employer consent required for biometrics. Effective Jul 2025.

name: Colorado Privacy Act
notes: GPC required. Cure period eliminated 2025.

name: Connecticut Data Privacy Act
notes: GPC required. 2026 amendment adds neural data as sensitive category.

name: Delaware Personal Data Privacy Act
notes: Includes employee data. Lower threshold.

name: Florida Digital Bill of Rights
notes: Narrow scope — $1B+ revenue companies only.

name: Illinois Biometric Information Privacy Act
notes: Private right of action. Most-litigated US privacy law.

name: Indiana Consumer Data Protection Act
notes: Indiana HEA 1003 — Virginia model. Excludes employee and B2B data.

name: Iowa Consumer Data Protection Act
notes: Business-friendly. 90-day cure period.

name: Kentucky Consumer Data Protection Act
notes: Virginia model. AG enforcement only.

name: Maryland Age-Appropriate Design Code
notes: Mirrors UK Children's Code. Under-18 protections.

name: Maryland Online Data Privacy Act
notes: Strictest data minimization in US. No cure period.

name: Minnesota Consumer Data Privacy Act
notes: GPC required. Strict data minimization.

name: Montana Consumer Data Privacy Act
notes: In force Oct 2024. Warrant required for law enforcement FRT.

name: Nebraska Data Privacy Act
notes: GPC required.

name: Nevada Consumer Health Data Privacy Law (SB 370)
notes: Private right of action. Consent required for health data.

name: New Hampshire Privacy Act (SB 255)
notes: Virginia model. 60-day cure period.

name: New Jersey Data Privacy Act
notes: GPC required. 30-day cure period.

name: New York Health Information Privacy Act (Advancing)
notes: Would be strictest US health data law. Active 2026 legislature.

name: NYC Commercial Establishments Biometric Surveillance Ordinance
notes: NYC Local Law 3 of 2021 — $500/violation private right of action. Commercial establishments.

name: Oklahoma Consumer Data Privacy Act (SB 546)
notes: 20th US state. Signed Mar 2026. Virginia VCDPA model.

name: Oregon Consumer Privacy Act
notes: GPC required. Covers nonprofits.

name: Rhode Island Data Transparency and Privacy Protection Act
notes: Low threshold. 60-day cure period.

name: Tennessee Information Protection Act
notes: Unique affirmative defense for bona fide privacy programs.

name: Texas Capture or Use of Biometric Identifiers (CUBI)
notes: Meta $1.4B settlement 2024. AG enforcement only.

name: Texas Data Privacy and Security Act
notes: No revenue threshold. GPC required.

name: Utah Consumer Privacy Act
notes: Business-friendly. Opt-out for sensitive data sales only.

name: Virginia Consumer Data Protection Act
notes: AG enforcement only. 30-day cure period.

name: Washington My Health MY Data Act
notes: Broadest US health data law. Private right of action.

name: Canada Bill C-27 — Consumer Privacy Protection Act (CPPA)
notes: Proposed federal replacement for PIPEDA. Includes AI system transparency obligations.

name: Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA)
notes: Federal Canadian privacy law for commercial activities.

name: Quebec Law 25 — Act Respecting the Protection of Personal Information in the Private Sector
notes: Quebec's modernised privacy law — stricter than PIPEDA, closest Canadian equivalent to GDPR.

name: Australia Privacy Act 1988 (amended)
notes: Australian federal privacy law. Includes Australian Privacy Principles and Notifiable Data Breaches scheme.

name: China Personal Information Protection Law (PIPL)
notes: China's comprehensive privacy law. Extraterritorial reach, data localisation, cross-border transfer restrictions.

name: India Digital Personal Data Protection Act (DPDPA) 2023
notes: India's first comprehensive data protection law. Consent-based framework, Data Protection Board enforcement.

name: Japan Act on Protection of Personal Information (APPI) 2022
notes: Japan's updated privacy law. Extraterritorial reach, breach notification, cross-border transfer restrictions.

name: Singapore Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA) 2012 (amended 2021)
notes: Singapore's data protection law. Includes mandatory breach notification and data portability.

name: South Korea Personal Information Protection Act (PIPA) 2023
notes: South Korea's data protection law. One of the strictest globally, with high penalties.

name: Brazil Lei Geral de Proteção de Dados (LGPD)
notes: Brazil's comprehensive data protection law. Similar structure to GDPR. Enforced by ANPD.

name: Saudi Arabia Personal Data Protection Law (PDPL) 2021
notes: Saudi Arabia's national data protection law. Enforced by SDAIA.

name: South Africa Protection of Personal Information Act (POPIA)
notes: South Africa's data protection law. Similar to GDPR, enforced by Information Regulator.

name: UAE Federal Data Protection Law (DPL) 2021
notes: UAE's first federal data protection law. Applies to non-government entities.

name: EDPB Guidelines on Automated Decision-Making (Art. 22 GDPR)
notes: Guidance on profiling and automated decisions including safeguards and right to explanation.

name: EDPB Guidelines on Facial Recognition in Law Enforcement
notes: EDPB guidance on facial recognition — restrictions, proportionality, and safeguards.

name: EDPB Guidelines on Video Surveillance (CCTV)
notes: EDPB guidance on CCTV and video surveillance including facial recognition in public spaces.

name: EU AI Act — Annex III (High-Risk AI Systems List)
notes: Definitive list of high-risk AI use cases: biometric ID, critical infrastructure, education, employment, essential services, law enforcement, migration, justice.

name: EU AI Act — Article 5 (Prohibited AI Practices)
notes: Prohibited AI: real-time biometric surveillance, social scoring, subliminal manipulation, exploitation of vulnerabilities.

name: EU AI Act — General Purpose AI (GPAI) Provisions
notes: GPAI model obligations including transparency, copyright, and systemic risk requirements.

name: EU AI Act — Safety Components and Robotics (Annex I)
notes: EU AI Act provisions applicable to AI-enabled machinery and safety components including robotics.

name: EU Artificial Intelligence Act (AI Act) — Full Text
notes: Comprehensive EU AI regulation. Risk tiers (prohibited, high-risk, limited, minimal). GPAI provisions.

name: EU Machinery Regulation 2023/1230 — AI and Robotics
notes: Updated EU machinery safety regulation covering AI-enabled and autonomous machinery.

name: GDPR Article 22 — Automated Decision-Making and Profiling
notes: Right not to be subject to solely automated decisions with significant effects. Human review requirement.

name: UK AI Safety Institute — Evaluation Framework
notes: UK AI Safety Institute evaluation methodology for frontier AI models.

name: CFPB Guidance on AI in Credit (Adverse Action Notices)
notes: CFPB on explainability requirements for AI-based credit decisions under ECOA.

name: CFPB — Model Risk Management Guidance (Algorithmic Credit)
notes: CFPB supervisory guidance on AI/ML credit scoring explainability

name: EEOC Guidance on AI and Algorithmic Tools in Employment
notes: EEOC AI and algorithmic fairness initiative — Title VII adverse impact guidance

name: Executive Order 13960 — Promoting the Use of Trustworthy AI in Government
notes: Federal AI use principles: lawful, purposeful, accurate, safe, understandable, responsible, traceable, regularly monitored.

name: Executive Order 14110 — Safe, Secure, and Trustworthy AI (Biden)
notes: Biden AI EO. Covers safety, security, privacy, equity, consumer protection, and international AI governance.

name: Executive Order 14179 — Removing Barriers to American Leadership in AI (Trump)
notes: Revoked Biden EO 14110. Prioritises AI innovation over regulation. Affects federal AI risk frameworks.

name: FTC Guidance on AI and Algorithmic Systems
notes: FTC guidance on AI marketing claims, algorithmic discrimination, and deceptive AI practices.

name: FTC Report on Commercial Surveillance and Biometric Data
notes: FTC commercial surveillance rulemaking including biometric data collection and use.

name: FTC Report on Facing the Truth About Facial Recognition
notes: FTC best practices for commercial facial recognition. Foundational US guidance.

name: NHTSA Automated Driving Systems — A Vision for Safety 2.0
notes: US federal voluntary guidance for autonomous vehicle safety, testing, and deployment.

name: NIST AI Risk Management Framework (AI RMF 1.0)
notes: Voluntary US AI risk management framework. GOVERN, MAP, MEASURE, MANAGE functions.

name: NIST AI RMF — Generative AI Profile (NIST AI 600-1)
notes: NIST profile for managing risks of generative AI including hallucination, bias, and data provenance.

name: NIST Face Recognition Vendor Testing (FRVT)
notes: NIST evaluation of facial recognition accuracy, bias, and demographic performance.

name: NIST Robotics and Autonomous Systems Safety Framework
notes: NIST guidance on safety, security, and trustworthiness for robotic and autonomous systems.

name: California AB 2013 — AI Training Data Transparency
notes: Requires disclosure of training data used in generative AI systems deployed in California.

name: California CPPA ADMT Regulations
notes: Risk assessments Jan 2026. Consumer ADMT opt-out Jan 2027.

name: California SB 1047 — Safe and Secure Innovation for Frontier AI (Vetoed)
notes: Vetoed California frontier AI safety bill. Context for ongoing state AI governance landscape.

name: Colorado AI Act (CAIA) — Automated Decisioning Tech
notes: In force Feb 2026. High-risk AI in employment, education, finance, healthcare.

name: Illinois Artificial Intelligence Video Interview Act
notes: Illinois law requiring employer disclosure and consent for AI-analysed video interviews.

name: NYC Local Law 144 — Automated Employment Decisions Tool
notes: Mandatory annual bias audits for AI hiring tools.

name: Washington State AI Systems Fairness Act (HB 1951)
notes: Washington AI fairness requirements for consequential decisions — employment, housing, credit.

name: Canada Directive on Automated Decision-Making
notes: Canadian federal directive on automated decision systems — impact assessment, transparency, human review.

name: China Algorithm Recommendation Regulations
notes: China's rules on algorithmic recommendation systems — transparency, user rights, non-discrimination.

name: China Generative AI Regulations (Provisional)
notes: China's regulations for generative AI services — content moderation, data security, model registration.

name: Singapore Model AI Governance Framework (2nd Ed)
notes: Singapore's practical AI governance framework — risk-proportionate approach, human-in-the-loop.

name: G7 Hiroshima AI Process — International Code of Conduct
notes: G7 voluntary code of conduct for advanced AI. Risk identification, transparency, incident reporting.

name: ISO 10218 — Robots and Robotic Devices Safety Requirements
notes: International safety standard for industrial robots. Covers risk assessment, safeguarding, and performance.

name: ISO/IEC 23894 — AI Risk Management
notes: ISO standard for AI risk management integrated with ISO 31000.

name: ISO/IEC 24028 — Overview of Trustworthiness in AI (Computer Vision)
notes: International standard covering trustworthiness in AI systems including computer vision applications.

name: ISO/IEC 42001 — AI Management System Standard
notes: International AI management system standard. Certifiable framework for responsible AI governance.

name: ISO/TR 23482 — Robotics — Application of ISO 13482 (Personal Care Robots)
notes: Safety requirements for personal care robots — physical assistant, mobile servant, person carrier types.

name: OECD Principles on AI
notes: OECD AI principles: inclusive growth, human rights, transparency, robustness, accountability.

name: UNESCO Recommendation on the Ethics of AI
notes: Global framework for AI ethics — human dignity, fairness, transparency, sustainability.

name: DORA — Digital Operational Resilience Act
notes: EU digital resilience for financial entities. ICT risk management, incident reporting, third-party risk, TLPT.

name: EU Cyber Resilience Act (CRA)
notes: Security requirements for products with digital elements — IoT, software, connected devices.

name: EU Cybersecurity Act — ENISA and Certification Framework
notes: EU cybersecurity certification framework and ENISA mandate.

name: EU NIS2 — ICT Supply Chain Security Requirements
notes: NIS2 supply chain security obligations — Article 21 security measures including vendor risk.

name: GDPR Article 32 — Security of Processing
notes: Technical and organisational security measures. Encryption, pseudonymisation, confidentiality, availability.

name: NIS2 Directive — Network and Information Security
notes: Expanded EU cybersecurity directive. Mandatory incident reporting, supply chain security, management accountability.

name: UK National Cyber Security Centre (NCSC) Cyber Essentials
notes: UK government-backed baseline cybersecurity certification scheme.

name: CISA Cybersecurity Performance Goals (CPGs)
notes: CISA baseline cybersecurity practices for critical infrastructure sectors.

name: Executive Order 14028 — Improving the Nation's Cybersecurity
notes: Zero trust architecture, software supply chain security, SBOMs, incident reporting for federal contractors.

name: FTC Safeguards Rule (Revised 2023) — Non-Bank Financial Institutions
notes: Updated FTC Safeguards Rule for non-bank financial institutions. Encryption, access controls, incident response.

name: NIST Cybersecurity Framework 2.0 (CSF 2.0)
notes: Updated NIST CSF. GOVERN, IDENTIFY, PROTECT, DETECT, RESPOND, RECOVER functions.

name: NIST SP 800-161r1 — Cybersecurity Supply Chain Risk Management
notes: Comprehensive guidance on cybersecurity supply chain risk management.

name: NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5 — Security and Privacy Controls
notes: Comprehensive federal security and privacy controls catalogue.

name: SEC Cybersecurity Disclosure Rules 2023
notes: Public company cybersecurity incident disclosure (4 business days), annual risk management reporting.

name: SOC 2 Trust Services Criteria (AICPA TSC 2017)
notes: Trust Services Criteria for security, availability, processing integrity, confidentiality, and privacy.

name: California CPPA — Cybersecurity Audit Regulations
notes: California CPPA proposed cybersecurity audit rules for high-risk businesses.

name: Australia Essential Eight Maturity Model
notes: Australian Cyber Security Centre's baseline mitigation strategies.

name: China Cybersecurity Law (CSL) 2017
notes: China's cybersecurity law covering network operators, data localisation, and critical infrastructure.

name: China Data Security Law (DSL) 2021
notes: China's data security law. Data classification, important data protection, cross-border data transfer.

name: Singapore Cybersecurity Act 2018
notes: Singapore's cybersecurity law covering critical information infrastructure protection and incident response.

name: ISO/IEC 27001:2022 — Information Security Management Systems
notes: Certifiable international information security management standard. 93 controls across 4 themes.

name: ISO/IEC 27002:2022 — Information Security Controls
notes: Detailed implementation guidance for ISO 27001 controls.

name: ISO/IEC 27701 — Privacy Information Management (PIMS)
notes: Privacy extension to ISO 27001/27002. Maps to GDPR requirements.

name: PCI DSS v4.0 — Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard
notes: Payment card security standard. 12 requirements covering network security, access control, monitoring.
